cards.name: [P1] Voodoo - Alexandre Yazdi (CEO)
cards.description:
**Studio:** Voodoo
**Contact:** Alexandre Yazdi
**Title:** CEO
**Priority:** 1 (Highest)
**Focus:** Hyper-casual games, mobile publishing
**Notable Titles:** Paper.io, Helix Jump, Snake VS Block

**Outreach Angle:**
AI-driven content generation for hyper-casual development. Voodoo's dominance in hyper-casual (Paper.io, Helix Jump) makes them the ideal partner for AI-powered dynamic content that scales without proportional headcount growth.

**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexandreyazdi/

---

**EMAIL DRAFT:**

Subject: AI for scaling hyper-casual hits like Paper.io

Hi Alexandre,

Paper.io and Helix Jump set the standard for hyper-casual dominance — but maintaining that velocity at scale is the real challenge.

I'm Lucas, founder of NEXUS AI. We're building AI infrastructure that generates dynamic, personalized game worlds for hyper-casual titles. Imagine Paper.io arenas that adapt to player behavior in real-time, or AI-generated levels that maintain quality while reducing design iteration time by 60%.

We help studios like Voodoo scale content production without scaling headcount proportionally.

Worth a brief conversation? Happy to share what we're seeing work with other top publishers.

[CALENDLY_LINK]

Best,
Lucas Fulks
Founder, NEXUS AI

---

**Status:** Ready to send
**Due Date:** 2026-02-28

cards.name: [P1] Homa Games - Daniel Nathan (CEO)
cards.description:
**Studio:** Homa Games
**Contact:** Daniel Nathan
**Title:** CEO
**Priority:** 1 (Highest)
**Focus:** Hyper-casual publishing, Homa Lab platform
**Notable Titles:** Sky Roller, Nerf Epic Pranks, Aquarium Land

**Outreach Angle:**
AI tools for rapid prototyping and market testing. Homa Lab has compressed prototype-to-hit time. AI-generated content is the next frontier for player engagement without live ops overhead.

**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielnathan/

---

**EMAIL DRAFT:**

Subject: AI + Homa Lab = faster hits?

Hi Daniel,

Homa Lab has already compressed the time from prototype to hit. The next frontier is AI-generated content that keeps players engaged longer without manual live ops overhead.

I'm Lucas, founder of NEXUS AI. We build AI infrastructure for dynamic game worlds — think Sky Roller tracks that evolve based on player skill, or Nerf Epic Pranks scenarios that regenerate automatically to maintain freshness.

The studios we're working with are seeing 40%+ increases in session length from AI-driven content variation.

Curious if this fits Homa's roadmap. Open to a 15-min call next week?

[CALENDLY_LINK]

Best,
Lucas Fulks
Founder, NEXUS AI

---

**Status:** Ready to send
**Due Date:** 2026-02-28

cards.name: [P1] Supersonic (Unity) - Developer Partnerships
cards.description:
**Studio:** Supersonic (Unity)
**Contact:** Developer Partnerships Team
**Title:** Developer Partnerships
**Priority:** 1 (Highest)
**Focus:** Hyper-casual publishing, Unity ecosystem
**Notable Titles:** Bridge Race, Sort It 3D, Join Clash

**Outreach Angle:**
Unity + AI integration for rapid hyper-casual development. Direct Unity integration opportunity — AI infrastructure that lives natively in Unity workflows for Supersonic's developer network.

**Note:** No specific LinkedIn available — use general partnerships contact

---

**EMAIL DRAFT:**

Subject: Unity + AI integration for Supersonic developers

Hi there,

Supersonic has built the strongest hyper-casual publishing platform inside Unity's ecosystem. The next unlock is AI infrastructure that lives natively in Unity — dynamic worlds that adapt without backend complexity.

I'm Lucas, founder of NEXUS AI. We're building AI-powered game world generation that integrates directly into Unity workflows. Bridge Race levels that self-balance difficulty. Sort It 3D puzzles that regenerate infinitely. All running client-side with zero backend overhead.

This could be a compelling offering for Supersonic's developer network.

Open to a 15-min conversation about partnership possibilities?

[CALENDLY_LINK]

Best,
Lucas Fulks
Founder, NEXUS AI

---

**Status:** Ready to send
**Due Date:** 2026-03-01
